title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
